name: attrtargetmgmt
author: Siemens Product Lifecycle Management Software Inc.

AddParamValueVisibility.expression: conditions.isTcReleaseAtLeast124 && !conditions.parameterTableEditInProgress && ctx.mselected.length > 0 && ctx.parammgmtctx.selectedProxyParams.length > 0 && conditions.Att1NotAROpen === true && ctx.parammgmtctx.parameterTableCtx.parameterSelectedInPramProjectContext &&  conditions.selectedParentHasWriteAccess && (conditions.isParamProjectSelected === true || conditions.isParamGroupSelected === true)

AddParamValueForProductVisibility.expression: conditions.isTcReleaseAtLeast124 && ctx.editInProgress !== true &&  ctx.occmgmtContext.selectedModelObjects.length === 1 && ctx.mselected.length >= 1 && (ctx.selectedAttrProxyObjects.length > 0 || ctx.selectedProxyObjects.length >0 ) && conditions.Att1NotAROpen === true && conditions.selectedParentHasWriteAccess

pasteAttributeVisibility.expression: !conditions.parameterTableEditInProgress && !conditions.isTcReleaseAtLeast122 && ctx.mselected.length === 1 && ctx.selected && conditions.Att1NotAROpen === true && (ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_AttributesForDCP' || ctx.xrtPageContext.secondaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_AttributesForDCP' || ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Attributes' || ctx.xrtPageContext.secondaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Attributes') && ctx.awClipBoardProvider.length > 0 && (ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('ItemRevision') > -1 || ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Awb0Element') > -1)

pasteParameterVisibility.expression: !conditions.parameterTableEditInProgress && (conditions.isTcReleaseAtLeast122 && ctx.mselected.length === 1 && ctx.selected && conditions.att1IsInContextOfAR === false && (ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_AttributesForDCP' || ctx.xrtPageContext.secondaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_AttributesForDCP' || ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Attributes'  || ctx.xrtPageContext.secondaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Attributes' || ctx.Att1ShowMappedAttribute ) && ctx.awClipBoardProvider.length > 0 && ctx.awClipBoardProvider[0].modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Att0MeasurableAttribute') > -1  &&  conditions.isValidParentSelection && conditions.selectedParentHasWriteAccess)

pasteParameterVisibilityForProject.expression: !conditions.parameterTableEditInProgress && conditions.isTcReleaseAtLeast122 && ctx.mselected.length === 1 && ctx.selected && conditions.Att1NotAROpen === true && ctx.awClipBoardProvider.length > 0 && ctx.xrtPageContext.secondaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Overview' && ( conditions.isParamProjectSelected || conditions.isParamGroupSelected )

noEditModeAndSelectForMappingTable.expression: ctx.Att1ShowMappedAttribute.mappingCommand ==='true' && ctx.isMappingTableEditing === false && ctx.selectedProxyObjects && ctx.selectedProxyObjects.length > 0 && ( !ctx.selectedAlignmentObjects || ctx.selectedAlignmentObjects.length < ctx.selectedProxyObjects.length )

Att1RemoveMeasurableAttrFromItemRev.expression: ctx.editInProgress !== true && ctx.occmgmtContext === undefined && conditions.Att1IsAttributeSelected === true && conditions.Att1IsAttributeParentModifiable === true && conditions.Att1IsAttrParentHomeFolder === false

Att1RemoveMeasurableAttrFromInContextVis.expression: conditions.Att1IsRemoveAttrCommandVisibleFromServer === true && ctx.editInProgress !== true && conditions.Att1IsAwb0ElementSelected === true && conditions.Att1IsAttributeParentModifiable === true && ctx.openedARObject === undefined && !conditions.isAttrProxyDCPView

Att1RemoveMeasurableAttrFromDCPVisibilit.expression: conditions.Att1IsAttributeSelected && conditions.selectedParentHasWriteAccess === true && !conditions.parameterTableEditInProgress && conditions.Att1IsAwb0ElementSelected === true  && ctx.openedARObject === undefined && conditions.isAttrProxyDCPView

removeMeasurableAttrFromSplitTableVisibi.expression: ctx.Att1ShowMappedAttribute.mappingCommand === 'true' && ctx.parammgmtctx.parameterTableCtx.selectedProxyParameters.length > 0 && conditions.selectedParentHasWriteAccess === true  && ctx.openedARObject === undefined && ctx.editInProgress === false

att0CutParamCmdCond.expression: conditions.isTcReleaseAtLeast122 && conditions.att1IsInContextOfAR === false && conditions.parametersAreSelectedFromTable && !conditions.att0IsMeasurementFileSelected && ( conditions.itemRevisionIsModifiableForDataSetParamTable || conditions.selectedParentHasWriteAccess && conditions.att1InContextParameterSelected === false )

att1ImportNewParamTableVisibility.expression: conditions.isTcReleaseAtLeast122 && !conditions.parameterTableEditInProgress && ( conditions.isParamProjectSelected || conditions.isParamGroupSelected || conditions.att1IsParamProxySelected || conditions.att1RoundTripParameterDefVisibility || conditions.att1ParameterTableIsVisible ||conditions.isInVRContextExceptStudy || conditions.Att1IsAwb0ElementSelected === true)

att1ReviseReplaceForProjectorGroup.expression: !conditions.parameterTableEditInProgress && conditions.isTcReleaseAtLeast123 && ctx.mselected.length > 0 && ctx.parammgmtctx.selectedProxyParams.length > 0 && conditions.Att1NotAROpen === true && ctx.parammgmtctx.parameterTableCtx.parameterSelectedInPramProjectContext &&  conditions.selectedParentHasWriteAccess && (conditions.isParamProjectSelected === true || conditions.isParamGroupSelected === true)

replaceParamRevisionForProjectorGroup.expression: conditions.isTcReleaseAtLeast123 && ctx.mselected.length === 1 && ctx.parammgmtctx.selectedProxyParams.length > 0 && conditions.Att1NotAROpen === true && ctx.parammgmtctx.parameterTableCtx.parameterSelectedInPramProjectContext &&  conditions.selectedParentHasWriteAccess && (conditions.isParamProjectSelected === true || conditions.isParamGroupSelected === true)
